text.title: Batch + Cache Stack Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

branch.when: async_ok == true AND volume_ok == true AND stable_prefix == true

conclusion.verdict: Install full stack: batch + cache_control on prefix. Target hit-rate ≥0.9.

branch.when: async_ok == true AND volume_ok == true AND stable_prefix == false

conclusion.verdict: Batch-only (50% off); cache will not hit.
Use sync + cache only; batch overhead exceeds savings for small volume.
preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.
